relevance_summary: P2RY13 is implicated as a potential biomarker for early detection of steroid-induced osteonecrosis of the femoral head due to its association with immune cell infiltration.
citations: Identification of key biomarkers in steroid-induced osteonecrosis of the femoral head and their correlation with immune infiltration by bioinformatics analysis. (2022). https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/35042504/

relevance_summary: NLRP1 is implicated in the inflammatory processes of Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head (SONFH) and shows potential as a diagnostic biomarker.
citations: NLRP1 ↔ corneal intraepithelial dyskeratosis-palmoplantar hyperkeratosis-laryngeal dyskeratosis syndrome. https://platform.opentargets.org/target/ENSG00000091592/associations
NLRP1 ↔ autoinflammation with arthritis and dyskeratosis. https://platform.opentargets.org/target/ENSG00000091592/associations
NLRP1 ↔ Corneal intraepithelial dyskeratosis with palmoplantar hyperkeratosis and laryngeal dyskeratosis. https://platform.opentargets.org/target/ENSG00000091592/associations
NLRP1 ↔ respiratory papillomatosis, juvenile recurrent, congenital. https://platform.opentargets.org/target/ENSG00000091592/associations
Pyroptosis -related potential diagnostic biomarkers in steroid-induced osteonecrosis of the femoral head. (2023). https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37491198/
